rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax and follow AADL component type or implementation annex conventions.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope and owner relationships when inserting annex content.
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; use implementation annexes for bindings and assignments.
Avoid inserting unsafe Boolean comparisons or opaque data range checks unless the data type is explicitly numeric.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component implementations may require bindings or assignments in their annex scope.
anti_patterns: Do not insert Boolean or opaque data range comparisons unless the data type supports numeric scalar interpretation.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract clauses and assume/guarantee syntax
